title: fix: remove duplicate apps from APPS.md
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Pruning the app garden
gist.blurb: Turns out our bots were a little too enthusiastic and cloned the entire app showcase a few times. We've pruned the duplicates, added some safety nets, and polished up the formatting.
gist.summary: Cleaned up the community apps showcase by removing over 1,600 duplicate entries caused by a bot glitch and implemented frontend deduplication.
gist.impact: The apps showcase is back to its accurate size, loading cleanly without duplicate entries or formatting artifacts.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee wearing a gardener's hat, pruning a giant overgrown pixel-art plant (representing the apps list) with tiny clippers. The Nomnom creature is happily eating the discarded duplicate leaves/code snippets.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny gardener's hat, carefully pruning an overgrown code-plant with tiny clippers. Nearby, the round tan Nomnom creature happily eats the discarded duplicate leaves. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
